import torch

def rope_kernel(q, cos, sin):
    # Optimized version using torch operations with better memory access patterns
    q_reshaped = q.view(*q.shape[:-1], q.shape[-1] // 2, 2)
    q_even = q_reshaped[..., 0]
    q_odd = q_reshaped[..., 1]
    
    # Ensure cos and sin have the right shape
    cos_reshaped = cos[..., 0::2] if cos.shape[-1] == q.shape[-1] else cos
    sin_reshaped = sin[..., 0::2] if sin.shape[-1] == q.shape[-1] else sin
    
    # Compute rotated values
    rotated_even = q_even * cos_reshaped - q_odd * sin_reshaped
    rotated_odd = q_even * sin_reshaped + q_odd * cos_reshaped
    
    # Stack and reshape back
    rotated = torch.stack([rotated_even, rotated_odd], dim=-1)
    return rotated.view_as(q)
